title: School Bus Crash in University City Injures One
summary: A crash involving a school bus in University City resulted in one injury. The presence of students on board is currently unknown.
charlotte_impact: Impacts local transportation and raises concerns about student safety in the University City area.

title: Rain and Storms Expected Late Wednesday
summary: The weather forecast predicts rain and possible storms arriving late Wednesday, with cooler temperatures expected for Friday.
charlotte_impact: Residents should prepare for potential weather changes and adjust outdoor activities accordingly.

title: Fatal Motorcycle Crash in University City
summary: A motorcycle crash at the intersection of North Tryon Street and University City Boulevard resulted in one fatality.
charlotte_impact: Highlights traffic safety concerns and the potential dangers on major roadways in University City.

title: Charlotte Man Charged with Multiple Vehicle Break-ins
summary: A Charlotte man faces 43 charges related to vehicle break-ins in Lincoln County, including theft of firearms and electronics.
charlotte_impact: Addresses crime trends and law enforcement efforts in Lincoln County.

title: Search for Missing Teen in Catawba County
summary: The Catawba County Sheriff's Office is searching for a missing 15-year-old, last seen in Conover early Friday.
charlotte_impact: Raises awareness about missing persons cases and community safety in Catawba County.

title: Search Continues for Missing Hunter in Lancaster County, SC
summary: Authorities are searching for 70-year-old Charles McCoy, who has been missing from a hunting area in Lancaster County since May 2.
charlotte_impact: Highlights search and rescue operations and safety concerns for outdoor activities.

title: Weather Alert: Severe Weather Possible Wednesday Night
summary: Charlotte could experience heavy rain and a low-end severe weather risk from Wednesday night into early Thursday.
charlotte_impact: Informs residents about potential weather hazards and encourages preparedness.

title: Fourth Arrest in Chesterfield County Shooting
summary: An 18-year-old has been charged with murder in connection to a fatal shooting in Chesterfield County, with a fourth suspect arrested.
charlotte_impact: Addresses violent crime and law enforcement efforts in Chesterfield County.

title: 'Logan's Law' Proposed to Track Violent Offenders
summary: Federal lawmakers will introduce "Logan's Law," proposing a public registry for violent offenders, in memory of Logan Federico.
charlotte_impact: Addresses systemic failures in tracking violent offenders and aims to improve public safety.

title: Housing for Teachers Considered on Former School Property
summary: Mecklenburg commissioners are considering converting a former school property into housing, prioritizing teachers.
charlotte_impact: Addresses affordable housing for teachers and supports community development.

title: CMS Board Addresses Budget Gaps
summary: The Charlotte-Mecklenburg School Board is working to close budget gaps for 2026-27, emphasizing equitable resource distribution.
charlotte_impact: Highlights financial challenges and priorities in the Charlotte-Mecklenburg School system.

title: Fire Chief Arrested on Drug Trafficking Charges
summary: The fire chief for the Morven Fire Department, William Stubbs, was arrested on drug trafficking and explosives charges.
charlotte_impact: Addresses corruption and illegal activities within public service roles.

title: US Navy Returns to Charlotte for Community Events
summary: The US Navy is in Charlotte for the first time in nearly 20 years, participating in community events across the region.
charlotte_impact: Promotes community engagement and strengthens ties between the Navy and Charlotte residents.

title: Police Search for Suspect in Livingstone College Break-ins
summary: Salisbury police are searching for a suspect involved in break-ins at Livingstone College, with 12 felony warrants issued.
charlotte_impact: Addresses security concerns and law enforcement efforts at Livingstone College.

title: Ryan Preece Fined for Texas Crash
summary: Ryan Preece was fined $50,000 and penalized 25 points for crashing Ty Gibbs in Sunday's NASCAR race at Texas.
charlotte_impact: Reports on disciplinary actions in NASCAR following a racing incident.
